title: fagara tomentella
intro: Fagara tomentella, also known as the Chinese prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Fagara tomentella include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Fagara tomentella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as a powder or capsule.
